title: LLB Jobs 2026 – Office Assistant, Accountant and More
shortInfo: TNNLU Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 5 vacancies for Project Co-ordinator, Program Manager, Documentation Officer, Office Assistant, and Accountant posts. Candidates can apply online on or before 07.06.2026 through the official website of Tamil Nadu National Law University (TNNLU).

basic_details.job_title: TNNLU Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Office Assistant, Accountant and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: TNNLU Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 5 vacancies for Project Co-ordinator, Program Manager, Documentation Officer, Office Assistant, and Accountant posts. Candidates can apply online on or before 07.06.2026 through the official website of Tamil Nadu National Law University (TNNLU).

application_fee.details: Project Coordinator: Rs.65,000 p.m. with an Annual Increment of 10% Program Manager: Rs.40,000 p.m. with an Annual Increment of 10% Documentation Officer: Rs.35,000 p.m. with an Annual Increment of 10% Office Assistant: Rs.20,000 p.m. with an Annual Increment of 10% Accountant: Rs.20,000 p.m. with an Annual Increment of 10%

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in Law or Master's degree in Social Work, Public Policy or related fields, Bachelor's degree in Law or Master's degree in Social Work, Public Policy or a related field, Master's Degree in any Discipline, Bachelor's degree in any discipline, Bachelor's degree in Commerce (Accountancy) with Certification in Tally
qualification.details: Project Co-ordinator: Bachelor's degree in Law or Master's degree in Social Work, Public Policy or related fields. Program Manager: Bachelor's degree in Law or Master's degree in Social Work, Public Policy or a related field. Documentation Officer: Master's Degree in any Discipline with prior experience as an MIS / Documentation Officer in any relevant Educational or Research Institution/Project. Office Assistant: Bachelor's degree in any discipline. Accountant: Bachelor's degree in Commerce (Accountancy) with Certification in Tally.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 07-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TNNLU to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the TNNLU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the TNNLU Recruitment 2026 is 07 June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available in the TNNLU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for the Project Eyalvathu Karavel recruitment at Tamil Nadu National Law University. These positions are for various roles within the project.

faq.question: What is the application fee for TNNLU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee for all categories is Rs. 500/-. This fee needs to be paid online as part of the application process.

faq.question: What is the minimum qualification required for the Office Assistant post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Office Assistant post is a Bachelor's degree in any discipline. Additionally, 1 year of experience in office management is preferred.

faq.question: What is the salary for the Project Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The Project Coordinator position offers a salary of Rs. 65,000 per month, with an annual increment of 10%. This is a contractual role.

faq.question: Can candidates from outside Tamil Nadu apply for these posts?
faq.answer: The notification does not specify any domicile restrictions. Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria are encouraged to apply, regardless of their state of residence.

faq.question: What is the mode of application for TNNLU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for the TNNLU Recruitment 2026 is strictly online. Candidates must apply through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions announced under the Project Eyalvathu Karavel recruitment are on a contractual basis. This means the employment is for a fixed term.

faq.question: What documents are required for the application?
faq.answer: Candidates are generally required to upload their photograph, signature, and relevant educational and experience certificates in the prescribed format. Specific details will be in the official notification.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article. It contains all detailed information regarding the recruitment.
